The '''Tatrang system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Tammuz sector/Legends|Tammuz sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the star [[Tatrang]], seven [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including [[Fyodos]], and the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] [[Tatrang VIII]].
